de: Amendment No 3 to the Project Agreement between the Government Office for Development and European Affairs and the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs (SECO)  - 15-07-2014 - Abkommen zwischen der Schweiz und der Slowenischen Regierung betreffend den Finanzzuschuss für das Projekt "Renewable Energy Sources in the Primorska Municipalities"
en: Amendment No 3 to the Project Agreement between the Government Office for Development and European Affairs and the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs (SECO)  - 15-07-2014 - Project Agreement between Switzerland represented by the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs and the Republic of Slovenia represented by the Government Office for Development and European Affairs as the National Coordination Unit concerning the Grant for the Project "Renewable Energy Sources in the Primorska Municipalities"
fr: Amendment No 3 to the Project Agreement between the Government Office for Development and European Affairs and the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs (SECO)  - 15-07-2014 - Accord entre la Suisse et le Gouvernement slovène concernant la donation pour le projet "Renewable Energy Sources in the Primorska Municipalities"
